# Official NestJS Best-Practice Sources (Imported)

This skill is based on official NestJS guidance:

- Modules:
  https://docs.nestjs.com/modules
  (source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nestjs/docs.nestjs.com/master/content/modules.md)
- Validation:
  https://docs.nestjs.com/techniques/validation
  (source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nestjs/docs.nestjs.com/master/content/techniques/validation.md)
- Configuration:
  https://docs.nestjs.com/techniques/configuration
  (source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nestjs/docs.nestjs.com/master/content/techniques/configuration.md)
- Authentication:
  https://docs.nestjs.com/security/authentication
  (source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nestjs/docs.nestjs.com/master/content/security/authentication.md)
- Authorization:
  https://docs.nestjs.com/security/authorization
  (source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nestjs/docs.nestjs.com/master/content/security/authorization.md)

Imported guidance areas used by this skill:

- Feature module architecture and exports/imports boundaries
- Global request validation with DTOs and `ValidationPipe`
- Environment-based configuration with `@nestjs/config`
- Authentication flow and JWT handling patterns
- Authorization patterns with guards and metadata
- Security expectations (e.g., hashed passwords, secret management)
